extension.description: Reusable regex/text/wildcard replacement commands for VS Code.
command.replaceInFile.title: Replace in File
command.replaceInSelection.title: Replace in Selection
command.openCommandManager.title: Open Command Manager
command.openRegExpUI.title: RegExp UI
submenu.editorTitle.label: RegExp Replacer
configuration.title: RegExp Replacer
configuration.ui.showIcon.description: Show an icon/menu for quick actions. Placement is controlled by Icon Placement.
configuration.ui.iconPlacement.descripti: Where to show the icon and action menu when Show Icon is enabled.
configuration.ui.iconPlacement.editor: Editor title bar (top-right), while the editor has focus.
configuration.commands.item.title: Command title.
configuration.commands.item.preCommands: VS Code command ids to run before replacement.
configuration.commands.item.postCommands: VS Code command ids to run after replacement.
configuration.commands.item.rules.title: Rule title (optional).
configuration.commands.item.rules.enable: Whether the rule is enabled. Disabled rules are skipped during replacement.
configuration.commands.item.rules.engine: Rule engine: regex, text, or wildcard.
configuration.commands.item.rules.testTe: Test text to prefill RegExp UI Test Editor for this rule (optional).
configuration.commands.item.rules.replac: Replace mode: template (normal replace) or map (match fragments first, then apply mapping cases).
configuration.commands.item.rules.map: Mapping table config (only used when replaceMode is map). For each main match fragment, apply cases to capture groups ($1..$n) in order and use only the first matching case, then write back into the fragment.
configuration.commands.item.rules.map.mo: Mapping mode: text (literal) or regex. In regex mode, case expressions are treated as JavaScript RegExp sources and applied globally (g).
configuration.commands.item.rules.map.ca: Mapping cases (top-to-bottom priority). In map mode, cases are applied to capture groups ($1..$n) and only the first matching case is used.
Case find pattern (literal text or RegExp source, depending on map.mode).
configuration.commands.item.rules.flags: Regex flags for this rule (regex engine only).
configuration.commands.item.rules.wildca: Whether wildcard * and ? can match newline.
configuration.commands.item.rules.preCom: Hook command ids to run before this rule (VS Code command ids or configured command ids).
configuration.commands.item.rules.postCo: Hook command ids to run after this rule (VS Code command ids or configured command ids).
